data.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — prior fix 720cbc2a fixed 3/4 tests, test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh still uses clone_test_repo at line 31 (high confidence). Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). ROOT_CAUSE: test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh uses clone_test_repo+ticket init (unfixed pattern), which fails under batch load due to silent ticket init failures. Fix: convert to clone_ticket_repo pattern (same as other 3 fixed tests in commit 720cbc2a). testing_mode=GREEN (test setup change, not behavioral assertion change)
